climate_characteristics.duration_notes: Multiple frost events including at least five days below 0°C in mid-September
climate_characteristics.notes: Frost events occurred during a dry season with low rainfall

impact.description: Widespread crop damage with reported yield losses ranging from moderate to severe, including major reductions and crop abandonment in some regions

confidence.notes: Well-documented across industry reports, government summaries, and regional observations

notes: Frost events coincided with widespread flowering due to synchronised crop development, increasing vulnerability across the region.
